title: Link CKC sheet versions to ComfyUI renders and OpenPose artifacts
operator_request: CKC should store good CUI-ready OpenPose images, CUI renders, and linked objects on character sheets or sheet versions for reuse.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Treat ComfyUI/OpenPose artifacts as typed reusable linked objects attached to CKC sheet versions.

scope.summary: Connect CKC, Posekit, and ComfyUI receipts so character sheet versions can hold reusable renders and OpenPose assets.
base_scope: Define typed links from character sheet versions to OpenPose exports.
Define typed links from character sheet versions to ComfyUI render receipts/artifacts.
Expose UI to browse, attach, detach, and reuse linked artifacts.
Make linked objects available to other Handshake modules via typed refs.
Update internal UserManual with artifact reuse workflow.
acceptance_criteria: A character sheet version can list linked OpenPose images and ComfyUI renders.
Links persist and round-trip through backend authority.
Artifacts can be reused through typed refs, not copied manually.
Argus can inspect and steer artifact link operations.
verification: Backend tests for typed artifact links.

implementation_summary: Added backend CKC sheet artifact link persistence for OpenPose/Comfy refs with typed atelier://sheet-artifact/{link_id} reuse refs.
Added API list/get/attach/detach routes with actor attribution, idempotent duplicate attach status, soft detach, event emission, and portable-ref validation.
Added native CKC UI controls and Argus author IDs for browsing, attaching, detaching, attaching latest Posekit export, actor attribution, status, and reuse refs.
Updated internal manual/tool rows for no-context model operation and parallel-agent attribution.
validation_summary: rustfmt --check passed for focused backend and frontend files.
git diff --check passed for focused files, with CRLF warnings only.
cargo metadata --no-deps passed for backend and frontend manifests.
Frontend source-level adversarial review passed after fixing async result ownership and required linked_by parsing.
validation_blockers: Focused cargo test commands for backend and frontend timed out during rustc compilation with no verdict; runtime PostgreSQL and Argus test pass is not claimed.
